helpText.aws: Automation, an AWS Systems Manager feature, allows you to safely automate common and repetitive IT operations and management tasks across AWS resources. You pay only for what you use and are charged based on the number and duration of steps.
helpText.aws-cn: Automation, an Amazon Systems Manager feature, allows you to safely automate common and repetitive IT operations and management tasks across Amazon resources. You pay only for what you use and are charged based on the number and duration of steps.

components.text: A step is defined as an initiated action performed in the Automation execution on a per-resource basis. There is a free tier of 100,000 steps per account per month. For multi-account automations, all steps including those run in any child accounts are counted only in the originating account.

placeholder.aws: Enter number of aws:executeScript steps per month
placeholder.aws-cn: Enter number of amazon:executeScript steps per month

components.description: Enter the average duration for each step (if the duration is less than 1 second then enter 1 second).

components.label: Playbook attachments stored
components.placeholder: Enter number of playbook attachments stored

components.label: Average size of playbook attachments
components.placeholder: Enter average size for each playbook attachment

constantUnitLabel.aws: free tier aws:executeScript seconds per month
constantUnitLabel.aws-cn: free tier amazon:executeScript seconds per month

label.aws: Total monthly cost for aws:executeScript steps
label.aws-cn: Total monthly cost for amazon:executeScript steps

components.label: Total monthly cost for playbook attachments
